mapper.select:
SELECT q.id, q.interviewer_id, i.name AS interviewerName, q.question, q.reference_answer, q.ai_interviewer_video_url, q.status, q.create_time, q.update_time FROM interview_question q LEFT JOIN interviewer i ON q.interviewer_id = i.id
AND q.question LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.question}, '%')
AND i.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.interviewerName}, '%')
ORDER BY q.create_time DESC
